input.needs: ERP system for core banking operations

output.subject: ERP Solutions for Sample Bank SC
output.body:
Dear Sample Bank SC,

eTech S.C. is pleased to present our ERP solution tailored for financial institutions. Our system automates core banking operations including general ledger, inventory, and HR modules. We have successfully deployed similar solutions for Zemen Bank and Ahadu Bank.

Would you be available for a demonstration this week?

Best regards,
Ahadu Gebresenbet
eTech S.C.
